releaseNotes: Removed direct fallback streams for Cool Fahrenheit and Flex 104.5; Online Radio now keeps Radio Browser API as the station source
Added audio-only filtering to remove TV/video/HLS-video entries from Online Radio lists
Updated About > Legal / Disclaimer with public radio directory and third-party station stream ownership wording
Maintained selected-station lock behavior from v6.5.24.26 so Player does not show Unknown Title while connecting
